MaxLineLength:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.kt:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.<no name provided>$connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `caffeine_intakes` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `drinkId` INTEGER, `drinkName` TEXT NOT NULL, `caffeineMg` INTEGER NOT NULL, `volumeMl` INTEGER NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL)")

MaxLineLength:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.kt:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.<no name provided>$connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drinks` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `caffeineMg` INTEGER NOT NULL, `volumeMl` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isDefault` INTEGER NOT NULL)")

MaxLineLength:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.kt:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.<no name provided>$connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `official_drink_cache` (`barcode` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `brand` TEXT, `caffeineMgPer100ml` REAL NOT NULL, `energyKcalPer100ml` REAL, `quantity` TEXT, `fetchedAtMillis` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`barcode`))")

MaxLineLength:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.kt:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.<no name provided>$connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pending_changes` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `entityType` TEXT NOT NULL, `entityId` TEXT NOT NULL, `operationType` TEXT NOT NULL, `payload` TEXT NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `retryCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `status` TEXT NOT NULL)")

MaxLineLength:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.kt:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.<no name provided>$connection.execSQL("INSERT OR REPLACE INTO room_master_table (id,identity_hash) VALUES(42, '134e39281560ea1aff0956e5fd8884da')")
MaxLineLength:CaffeineIntakeDao.kt:CaffeineIntakeDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM caffeine_intakes WHERE timestamp >= :startOfDay AND timestamp < :endOfDay ORDER BY timestamp DESC")
MaxLineLength:CaffeineIntakeDao.kt:CaffeineIntakeDao$@Query("SELECT COALESCE(SUM(caffeineMg), 0) FROM caffeine_intakes WHERE timestamp >= :startOfDay AND timestamp < :endOfDay")

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:DataStorePreferences.kt:DataStorePreferences$catch (e: Exception) { // Fallback to SharedPreferences cachedLanguage = LanguagePreferences.getLanguage(context) cachedThemeMode = ThemePreferences.getThemeMode(context) initialized = true Timber.w(e, "DataStore init failed, using SharedPreferences fallback") }
SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:DrinkViewModel.kt:DrinkViewModel$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.e(e, "Failed to log drink") _uiState.update { it.copy(error = DrinkError.AddIntakeFailed) } onError() }

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:EditIntakeViewModel.kt:EditIntakeViewModel$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.e(e, "Failed to delete intake") _uiState.update { it.copy(error = EditIntakeError.DeleteFailed) } onError() }

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:EditIntakeViewModel.kt:EditIntakeViewModel$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.e(e, "Failed to load intake $intakeId") _uiState.update { EditIntakeUiState(isLoading = false, error = EditIntakeError.LoadFailed) } }

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:EditIntakeViewModel.kt:EditIntakeViewModel$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.e(e, "Failed to save intake") _uiState.update { it.copy(error = EditIntakeError.SaveFailed) } onError() }

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:ManageDrinksViewModel.kt:ManageDrinksViewModel$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.e(e, "Failed to delete drink") _uiState.update { it.copy(deleteConfirmation = null, error = ManageDrinksError.DeleteFailed) } }

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:ManageDrinksViewModel.kt:ManageDrinksViewModel$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.e(e, "Failed to save drink") _uiState.update { it.copy(error = ManageDrinksError.SaveFailed) } }
SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:OfficialDrinkRepositoryImpl.kt:OfficialDrinkRepositoryImpl$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.w(e, "API load failed, falling back to stale cache") loadStaleFromCache() }

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:OfficialDrinkRepositoryImpl.kt:OfficialDrinkRepositoryImpl$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.w(e, "API search failed for '%s', searching local cache", query) searchLocalCache(query) }

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:OfficialDrinksViewModel.kt:OfficialDrinksViewModel$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.e(e, "Failed to import drink: ${official.name}") _uiState.update { it.copy(importingBarcode = null, error = OfficialDrinksError.ImportFailed) } }

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:OfficialDrinksViewModel.kt:OfficialDrinksViewModel$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.e(e, "Search crashed for: $query") _uiState.update { it.copy(isLoading = false, error = OfficialDrinksError.SearchFailed) } }

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:OfficialDrinksViewModel.kt:OfficialDrinksViewModel$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.e(e, "Unexpected error loading official drinks") _uiState.update { it.copy(isLoading = false, drinks = emptyList()) } }

{ public override fun createAllTables(connection: SQLiteConnection) { connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `caffeine_intakes` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `drinkId` INTEGER, `drinkName` TEXT NOT NULL, `caffeineMg` INTEGER NOT NULL, `volumeMl` INTEGER NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL)") connection.execSQL("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_intakes_timestamp` ON `caffeine_intakes` (`timestamp`)") connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drinks` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `caffeineMg` INTEGER NOT NULL, `volumeMl` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isDefault` INTEGER NOT NULL)") connection.execSQL("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_drinks_name` ON `drinks` (`name`)") connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `official_drink_cache` (`barcode` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `brand` TEXT, `caffeineMgPer100ml` REAL NOT NULL, `energyKcalPer100ml` REAL, `quantity` TEXT, `fetchedAtMillis` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`barcode`))") connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pending_changes` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `entityType` TEXT NOT NULL, `entityId` TEXT NOT NULL, `operationType` TEXT NOT NULL, `payload` TEXT NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `retryCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `status` TEXT NOT NULL)") connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)") connection.execSQL("INSERT OR REPLACE INTO room_master_table (id,identity_hash) VALUES(42, '134e39281560ea1aff0956e5fd8884da')") } public override fun dropAllTables(connection: SQLiteConnection) { connection.execSQL("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `caffeine_intakes`") connection.execSQL("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `drinks`") connection.execSQL("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `official_drink_cache`") connection.execSQL("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `pending_changes`") } public override fun onCreate(connection: SQLiteConnection) { } public override fun onOpen(connection: SQLiteConnection) { internalInitInvalidationTracker(connection) } public override fun onPreMigrate(connection: SQLiteConnection) { dropFtsSyncTriggers(connection) } public override fun onPostMigrate(connection: SQLiteConnection) { } public override fun onValidateSchema(connection: SQLiteConnection): RoomOpenDelegate.ValidationResult { val _columnsCaffeineIntakes: VariableNaming:CaffeineIntakeDao_Impl.kt:CaffeineIntakeDao_Impl$val _sql: String = "SELECT * FROM caffeine_intakes ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT ?"
VariableNaming:CaffeineIntakeDao_Impl.kt:CaffeineIntakeDao_Impl$val _sql: String = "SELECT * FROM caffeine_intakes WHERE timestamp >= ? AND timestamp < ? ORDER BY timestamp DESC"
VariableNaming:CaffeineIntakeDao_Impl.kt:CaffeineIntakeDao_Impl$val _sql: String = "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(caffeineMg), 0) FROM caffeine_intakes WHERE timestamp >= ? AND timestamp < ?"
VariableNaming:DrinkDao_Impl.kt:DrinkDao_Impl$val _sql: String = "SELECT * FROM drinks ORDER BY name ASC"
VariableNaming:DrinkDao_Impl.kt:DrinkDao_Impl$val _sql: String = "SELECT * FROM drinks WHERE name LIKE '%' || ? || '%' ORDER BY name ASC"
VariableNaming:OfficialDrinkCacheDao_Impl.kt:OfficialDrinkCacheDao_Impl$val _sql: String = "SELECT * FROM official_drink_cache ORDER BY name ASC"

VariableNaming:PendingChangeDao_Impl.kt:PendingChangeDao_Impl$val _sql: String = """ | | SELECT * FROM pending_changes | WHERE entityType = ? AND entityId = ? AND status = 'PENDING' | LIMIT 1 | """.trimMargin()
VariableNaming:PendingChangeDao_Impl.kt:PendingChangeDao_Impl$val _sql: String = "SELECT * FROM pending_changes WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY timestamp ASC"
VariableNaming:PendingChangeDao_Impl.kt:PendingChangeDao_Impl$val _sql: String = "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pending_changes WHERE status = 'FAILED'"
